name: Effigy fiscal data updater (PHP)
description: Modular PHP 8.2 subsystem that fetches and caches European and Portuguese fiscal reference data (Euribor, tax tables, VAT, inflation) for integration with a credit-site stack.
longDescription: Packaged as a public_html module with Docker support, the fiscal updater orchestrates HTTPS calls to official APIs (ECB, Eurostat, Portuguese AT-style sources per module docs), normalizes results, validates cache integrity, and feeds both JSON cache and legacy tax text files used by upstream simulators. A CLI entrypoint supports manual runs and tests; PHPUnit covers core components. Docker Compose enables local verification on a fixed port without touching production hosts.
features: Orchestrated fiscal data fetch with dedicated API client and SSL verification
JSON cache with integrity checks and backup handling
CLI tooling for operators and automated test suites
Dockerfile and compose for repeatable local runs
Separation between cache, logs, and public module code
highlights: Deterministic pipeline from official APIs to simulator-facing artifacts
Test-backed PHP components for fiscal transformations
Containerized environment for local smoke testing and QA
challenges: Financial reference data must stay current, verifiable, and resilient to upstream API changes without silent corruption of cached files.
solutions: Central orchestrator class, explicit cache validation, structured logging discipline, and automated tests around the updater and API client.
security: HTTPS client with certificate verification enabled
Secrets supplied via environment templates—not hardcoded in module code
Least-privilege file layout for cache and logs
